AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein citizen
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an ordinary citizen living in a Wolfein city. The growing pressure of survival and the escalating civil conflict have taken a toll on her daily life. Rather than being drafted to fulfill some civic duty, she simply hopes to hold on to what little stability she still has.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein farmer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lives in a rural area far from the Wolfein cities, toiling diligently in the fields contracted by a Wolfein company to meet the exorbitant taxes imposed by MegaCorp.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein anassembly line worker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a worker on the assembly line of a Wolfein company, where her entire life revolves around tirelessly meeting the various quotas assigned by the line supervisor.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein contract miner
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a miner in the Resource Development Department of a Wolfein company. Though she works day after day in the harsh and perilous environment of the mines, [PAWN_nameDef] has never forgotten the dreams and aspirations she once held.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein builder
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is tasked with adding more concrete pillars to the Wolfein cities, and the busy, arduous life spent on scaffolding has become her daily routine.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein serf
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef], unable to repay her debts, was forced to sell everything she had, including her freedom and human rights, to the Wolfein MegaCorp. Now, she clings to life as an agricultural slave under their control.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein hunter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] once lived by hunting in the forest, avoiding the cities controlled by the Wolfein MegaCorp. Her self-reliant life kept her free from Wolfein rule. But as the cities kept growing, her land kept shrinking. In the end, [PAWN_nameDef] fled to the edge of the world.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein fisher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living by fishing and brought her catch to a nearby market, where it was collected by the Wolfein MegaCorp. With her skill and experience, she ranked among the top ten thousand registered fishers under the Wolfein system that year.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein merchant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] formed her own trade caravan, traveling between settler colonies to sell goods. Sometimes she also visited settlements of other factions to make deals. But her biggest problem was the rising number of bandit attacks along the trade routes.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein carpenter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a traditional carpenter. With rapid technological advances, such work has long been replaced by machines. But in a village far from the Wolfein cities, her craftsmanship remains essential. After all, the Wolfein MegaCorp's mass-produced goods are neither customized nor cost-effective.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein tailor
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a tailor running her own small shop. Her excellent sewing skills have earned the trust of the local residents. Sometimes she designs and creates clothes herself, but most of her time is spent fulfilling military textile orders from the Wolfein MegaCorp.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein teacher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at an educational institution under the Wolfein MegaCorp in a Wolfein Federation city. Though teaching is exhausting, she prefers being around students who are still untouched by society. Their innocence and energy inspire her and make all the effort feel worthwhile.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein surgeon
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at a local hospital, where the daily workload is already demanding. After a recent wave of terrorist attacks by the resistance, she has been overwhelmed treating large numbers of innocent casualties.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein emergency nurse
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at a local hospital, usually handling minor cases and only occasionally dealing with severe ones. Now, she is helping treat victims of a terrorist attack, and the work has placed a significant psychological strain on her.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein chef
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at an upscale restaurant, where her unique cooking skills have won over many core employees of the company. Her dream is to one day become head chef at an even more luxurious venue, hoping to reach the upper class through her craft—at least in terms of taste.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein logger
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: In the untamed forests where technology has yet to reach, [PAWN_nameDef] makes a living by felling trees with more primitive methods. Though machines can now do the job more efficiently, she still prefers the feel of swinging an axe herself. After all, this way she doesn’t have to pay the company’s steep maintenance fees.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein car mechanic
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at an auto repair shop, equipped with solid knowledge of vehicle maintenance. She skillfully uses various diagnostic tools to inspect, tune, and repair vehicles.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein mechanic
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a mechanic responsible for installing, calibrating, and maintaining various machines. With solid knowledge of mechanical systems and electronics, she consistently completes every task assigned by the Wolfein MegaCorp with excellence.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein waiter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a waitress at a restaurant and has a unique talent for resolving customer complaints. Every guest she serves ends up leaving the place with a smile.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein ranger
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a forest ranger tasked with protecting the Wolfein MegaCorp's woodland territory and monitoring for any violations of corporate property. She prefers living close to nature over breathing smog in the city—especially when she gets paid for it.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein police
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a city patrol officer, usually handling neighborhood disputes, thefts, and brawls. Occasionally, she is requisitioned by the Wolfein MegaCorp’s security division to help suppress strikes. But with resistance attacks growing more severe, she now faces far more dangerous assignments than before.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein biologist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a biotech researcher focused on genetic studies. Through in-depth analysis of Wolfein genetics, she has developed new methods for treating diseases and made significant contributions to unlocking the potential of the Wolfein race.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein tramp
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has no job in the Wolfein city and would rather wander the streets than sell herself to the Wolfein MegaCorp. She survives by begging and scavenging. But if a major crisis were to strike the city, she might be the one who knows best how to survive it.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein unemployed
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is currently unemployed in the Wolfein city. She was fired for refusing to work overtime—something she has grown used to by now. She's looking for a job that doesn’t demand overtime, though everyone knows Wolfein MegaCorp never puts “overtime” in the contract.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein food-delivery staff
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] picked up a part-time job as a food delivery worker. No matter the road conditions, she always managed to deliver meals on time. But after seeing news of some food companies testing drone deliveries, she’s already getting ready to look for her next gig.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein plumber
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a plumber responsible for inspecting and maintaining pipeline systems. Dealing with all kinds of pipes takes up most of her day. Tired of constantly getting soaked, she’s now thinking about switching to electrical work instead.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein electrician
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an electrician in charge of inspecting and maintaining electrical systems. Most of her time is spent dealing with all sorts of wiring. Tired of constantly getting her hair tangled in wires, she’s now thinking of switching to plumbing.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein athlete
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a talented sprinter who has won multiple awards in city-level athletic meets. She dreams of one day running on a bigger stage, where she can fully showcase her speed and strength.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein bouncer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as a security guard at a large shopping mall. In the past, her duties mostly involved keeping out thieves and vagrants. But after a series of terrorist attacks by the resistance in Wolfein Federation cities, she’s been forced to rethink the risks of her job.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein florist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a florist who finds comfort in the company of plants amid the cold, rigid life of the city. After a terrorist attack destroyed the flower shop where she once worked, she was forced to seek a new path—but deep down, she never gave up her love for the craft.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein lawyer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at a law firm, handling various disputes on behalf of Wolfein MegaCorp. But after repeatedly witnessing the dark truths behind the cases, she has begun to question her faith in the profession.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein reporter
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] once worked as a journalist at a television station. After reporting on a scandal tangled with too many vested interests, she was reassigned to cover far more dangerous stories.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein cleaner
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works for a domestic cleaning company and is exceptionally good at her job. She almost always receives top ratings on Wolfein’s service platform—after all, if a client doesn’t leave a good review, she has her own ways of convincing them to reconsider. So far, it’s never failed.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein accountant
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works as an accountant at Wolfein MegaCorp, and her ledgers often contain some rather unusual entries. Her creative techniques have earned the company a fair share of extra profit. So when the corporation decided to pin the blame for some bad accounts on her, [PAWN_nameDef] had already filed for administrative leave—just in time.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein actor
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a moderately well-known performer, known for [PAWN_pronoun]’s impressive acting and captivating voice in several films. However, during a trip for a performance, [PAWN_pronoun] was caught in an accident and was forced to make an emergency landing in the outer frontier.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein sculptor
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a sculptor who insists on using traditional carving techniques. As technology advances, this old craft is slowly fading from memory—but [PAWN_nameDef] still finds deep satisfaction in shaping each piece by hand. After all, there’s never a shortage of clueless rich Wolfeins willing to pay top credits to decorate their homes with “art.”

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein artist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a talented artist skilled in both digital illustration and traditional painting. As automated image generation becomes increasingly widespread and far more efficient than hand-drawn art, many artists have seen their livelihoods impacted. Yet, [PAWN_nameDef] scoffs at the trend, continuing to paint her own world, one brushstroke at a time.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein kindergarten teacher
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has always loved children, and after much effort, she finally became a kindergarten teacher. Though caring for and educating young kids is far from easy, [PAWN_nameDef] remains passionate about her work and continues to cherish her role.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein geologist
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is an accomplished geologist, primarily focused on studying tectonic activity, volcanic patterns, and other geological phenomena. However, most of [PAWN_pronoun]’s time is spent conducting commercial surveys for the Wolfein MegaCorp. To support her research, [PAWN_pronoun] is also well-versed in excavation tools and often carries out ground sampling herself.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein massager
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] runs a legitimate massage parlor in a city within the Wolfein Federation. Her skilled hands are well-known for relieving the stress and fatigue of a long day’s work. Occasionally, some clients come in seeking "extra services," but after a firm explanation—and, when necessary, some persuasive physical methods—they quickly learn to take their business elsewhere.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein massager
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works at a massage parlor in the red-light district of a Wolfein Federation city. With an in-depth understanding of Wolfein physiology and a remarkable ability to cater to her clients' unique requests, she has helped make the establishment notably successful.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein hacker
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] possesses an exceptional understanding of IT and hacking. In an attempt to showcase [PAWN_pronoun]’s skills, [PAWN_pronoun] breached a company’s system and stole classified business data. Now a wanted figure, [PAWN_nameDef] is on the run, constantly evading law enforcement.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein thief
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] comes from an impoverished background. With the crushing pressure from the MegaCorp and the escalating civil conflict, [PAWN_pronoun]’s life has become increasingly desperate. Left with few choices, [PAWN_pronoun] turned to petty theft just to survive.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein robber
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a seasoned criminal who turned to robbery and kidnapping after a failed investment. Together with [PAWN_pronoun]’s accomplices, [PAWN_pronoun] abducts Wolfein citizens to extort ransom from their families. With sharp counter-surveillance skills, [PAWN_nameDef] has become a constant thorn in the side of law enforcement.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein drug dealer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] makes a living selling illegal psychoactive drugs. Through a special supply channel, [PAWN_pronoun] acquires the substances and resells them to those in need of a fix. [PAWN_pronoun]’s clients come from all walks of life—corporate executives, famous actors, homeless drifters, and even underage students.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein hit man
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a professional assassin, an expert at making targets disappear without a trace. As a true professional, [PAWN_pronoun] never asks about the employer’s motives—only how much the job pays.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein psionic killer
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is no ordinary assassin—[PAWN_pronoun] possesses unique psionic abilities that aid in completing missions. This uncommon power has made [PAWN_pronoun] a favored choice among high-paying clients.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein fugitive
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was imprisoned for a murder charge. When a series of terrorist attacks plunged the city into chaos, [PAWN_pronoun] seized the chance to escape. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] is on the run, living as a fugitive.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein smuggler
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] works in a smuggling crew, primarily handling the transportation of contraband and the delivery of sensitive information. This illegal line of work has earned her a generous profit. She often brags to her associates about the high status and deep pockets of her clientele.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein fugitive
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was imprisoned for a murder charge. When a series of terrorist attacks plunged the city into chaos, [PAWN_pronoun] seized the chance to escape. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] is on the run, living as a fugitive.

AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.title: Wolfein Big Bad Wolf
AlienRace.AlienBackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a big, bad Wolfein who claims she was born for the kind of work that's "not exactly aboveboard"—though in the eyes of others, she might just be a little too fond of acting tough.
